appearanceNotes: Regal fire-channeler queen in dark basalt regalia with molten-gold trim and a crown shaped like curling flame.
personalityNotes: Measured, formidable, maternal, and politically shrewd.
relationshipSummary: Married to Prince-Consort Oren Ashmantle; mother of Crown Prince Kaelen and Princess Lyra; niece of Dowager Queen Maelis.
notes: Rules from a palace built into the lip of the volcano and tries to keep passion from turning into chaos.

titleOrRank: Prince-Consort and Master of the Furnace Guard
appearanceNotes: Broad-shouldered royal strategist with ember-red cloak, forge-bright pauldrons, and a voice like banked coals.
personalityNotes: Protective, disciplined, patient, and quietly affectionate.
relationshipSummary: Husband to Queen Seraphine; father of Kaelen and Lyra; trusted by the Furnace Guard and respected by Maelis.
notes: Coordinates the capital's defenses, evacuation drills, and the guard that protects the palace approaches.

appearanceNotes: Athletic young heir wearing light ceremonial armor with ash-gray feather motifs and a training spear.
personalityNotes: Bold, idealistic, eager to prove himself, and impulsively heroic.
relationshipSummary: Eldest child and heir of Seraphine and Oren; older brother of Lyra; deeply influenced by his great-aunt Maelis's stories of past eruptions.
notes: Often seen on the ramparts or training grounds, trying to earn the loyalty of soldiers and commoners alike.

appearanceNotes: Elegant princess in red-orange silk layered with translucent heat-glass panels and sun-bright jewelry.
personalityNotes: Insightful, witty, empathetic, and more politically perceptive than she lets on.
relationshipSummary: Daughter of Seraphine and Oren; younger sister of Kaelen; favorite grand-niece of Maelis and a frequent mediator between court factions.
notes: Handles emissaries, public ceremonies, and the delicate task of explaining royal decisions to the city.

appearanceNotes: Older matriarch with silver-streaked hair, volcanic-glass cane, and black-and-crimson robes set with old royal medals.
personalityNotes: Sharp-tongued, deeply loyal, theatrical, and unexpectedly warm with younger family members.
relationshipSummary: Aunt and mentor to Queen Seraphine; grand-aunt to Kaelen and Lyra; keeps Oren honest and trains the family to respect the city's history.
notes: Serves as keeper of memory, court historian, and the emotional anchor of the fire royal household.
